creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text: IMO, the best strategy is to first identify all flang shortcoming on amd64, and make flang fix them. At some point I've started this, and creates several bug reports for flang. I know that there are quite a few to go. Otherwise, you will soon run into this problem that gfortran6 ports can't be mixed with flang ones. USES=fortran is currently required even when only some dependency is gortran6-based. This will cause conflicts with flang.
